original_image_tags: A single page of faded pink or salmon-colored paper. The page is mostly blank, with text appearing in reverse as a bleed-through from the opposite side. Two dark, irregular punch-holes or tears are visible at the top. Several stamped notations are visible at the bottom.

elements.description: Pinkish paper showing the reverse side of a document with faint, inverted, and illegible typed text bleeding through from the other side, along with several blue ink stamps.
Blue ink stamp reading 'RECEIVED AUG 8 9 56 AM '47 U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FBI'.
Blue ink stamp reading 'RECEIVED-AUG 8 11 17 AM '47 FBI' with some faint illegible handwritten text above it.
Blue ink stamp reading 'RECEIVED' with a timestamp 'P 27 2 36 PM', followed by 'INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' and 'REP. OF SUB'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is the pinkish back of a document with inverted bleed-through text and several stamps, and they do not contradict each other on the specific quoted stamp text, as Description A only mentions 'several stamped notations' without quoting them.
